hero.sub: A coaching path for mothers returning to work. Find clarity, confidence and a rhythm that's truly yours — in Italian, English or Dutch.

forWho.title: Three mothers, one shared pattern.
forWho.sub: You don't need to have it all figured out. You just need to be willing to start looking.

items.title: I'm coming back from maternity leave
items.body: The first months are a wave. Putting identity, schedule and ambition back together — without the guilt.

items.title: I want to change direction
items.body: Motherhood rewrote your priorities. The old job doesn't fit — what's needed now is a clear pivot, not a leap in the dark.

items.title: I need a sustainable rhythm
items.body: Not the magazine version of work-life balance. A real way to be a mother and a professional that doesn't drain you every Friday night.

benefits.title: What you walk away with.
benefits.sub: One session won't change your life. But it changes the angle you look at it from — and often, that's enough.

items.title: Clarity
items.body: Understanding what you actually want — not what you should want.

items.title: Strategy
items.body: A concrete plan for the next 30 days, not a list of resolutions.

items.title: Support
items.body: You're not alone. A coach who listens — no judgement, no rush.

items.title: Multilingual
items.body: Italiano, English, Nederlands. The language you think in, not the one you have to translate from.

howItWorks.title: Three steps, zero friction.
howItWorks.sub: From click to calendar. No long forms, no waiting.

steps.title: Pick a slot
steps.body: Live calendar in Italian, English and Dutch. Pay in one seamless flow — card, Apple Pay, Google Pay, SEPA.

steps.title: Get confirmation
steps.body: Branded email, Google Calendar invite, Google Meet link, reminders at 24h and 1h. All automatic.

steps.title: We meet
steps.body: 60 minutes from your browser. No app to install, works on your phone. You leave with a plan.

items.quote: After my second maternity leave I didn't know where to begin. In an hour I had a map again.
items.author: Giulia

items.quote: I thought it was my problem. It was a priority problem. Changes everything.
items.author: Sanne

faq.title: What you might want to know first.

items.a: 60 minutes. Long enough to go deep, short enough to leave with concrete actions.
Directly at booking, via Stripe. One-off or 3 instalments — card, Apple Pay, Google Pay or SEPA.
Yes, up to 24 hours before, at no cost. You'll find the link in your confirmation email.
Italian, English or Dutch. You pick the one you feel freest in.

items.q: Is it a program or a single session?
items.a: You can start with a discovery session. If it feels right to continue, we design a path together.

finalCta.title: One hour for you — and for who you want to become.
finalCta.sub: The first step costs less than dinner out. The rest is up to you.

footer.tagline: Coaching for mothers returning to work.
